name: upload_files
description: Upload one or more files directly to UploadThing from your server. Returns file URLs and metadata after successful upload.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Array of file objects to upload. Each object contains the file name and base64-encoded content.

parameters.name: contentDisposition
parameters.description: How the file should be served. Use 'inline' to display in browser or 'attachment' to force download.

parameters.name: acl
parameters.description: Access control for the uploaded files. Options are 'public-read' or 'private'.
